protein_name: Clathrin is the major protein of the polyhedral coat of coated pits and vesicles. Acts as component of the TACC3/ch-TOG/clathrin complex proposed to contribute to stabilization of kinetochore fibers of the mitotic spindle by acting as inter-microtubule bridge. Belongs to the clathrin light chain family. 5 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
